description: RAG retrieval: chunk from old source year is included — verifier passes (stale warning is retriever/reranker concern, not verifier).
what_bug_this_catches: Regression where old source_year in guideline chunk causes verifier to incorrectly reject the citation (staleness of guideline evidence is a reranker concern, not a verifier hard drop).

packets.label: MMR vaccine
packets.value: Two doses of MMR vaccine are recommended for most adults who do not have evidence of immunity.

claims.text: Per CDC-ACIP (2015), two MMR doses are recommended for adults without evidence of immunity.
claims.caveat: This recommendation is from 2015; verify against the current schedule.
